info.description: Enterprise gateway for Autonomi decentralized storage. Provides file upload/download, user management, API tokens, webhooks, and admin controls.
info.title: Indelible API

get.description: Return cost analytics broken down by token and department

parameters.description: Number of days to look back (default 7)
parameters.name: days

get.description: Return API token usage statistics for the specified time period

parameters.description: Number of days to look back (default 7)
parameters.name: days

get.description: Return upload statistics for the specified time period

parameters.description: Number of days to look back (default 7)
parameters.name: days

get.description: Return all permission groups with member counts

post.description: Create a new permission group with a specified permission level

put.description: Update a group's name, description, permission level, or active status

delete.description: Remove a permission group and all its memberships

get.description: Return the resolved members of a group (id, email, display name). V2-304.

post.description: Add a user to a permission group

delete.description: Remove a user from a permission group

get.description: Return audit log entries with optional filtering (permanent, never deleted)

Return system log entries with optional filtering (retention-managed)
Return config_audit entries showing old/new value, actor, IP, and UA for every settings change. Permanent (never purged).
Return user activity log entries with optional filtering
Return all configured OIDC identity providers

post.description: Register a new OIDC identity provider with encrypted client secret

put.description: Update an existing OIDC provider's configuration (empty client_secret keeps existing)
Configure whether unknown sub/email pairs create new local users (off by default), and which group new users join

get.description: Return all configured storage quotas

post.description: Create a new storage quota for an entity type

put.description: Update a quota's max bytes and enabled status

get.description: Return all SCIM tokens (no secrets shown)

post.description: Generate a new SCIM bearer token for identity provider integration

delete.description: Revoke a SCIM token by ID

get.description: Return all system configuration settings

patch.description: Apply partial updates to system settings with audit logging

get.description: Download all settings as a JSON file for backup or migration

post.description: Restore settings from a JSON export (supports structured and legacy flat formats)

get.description: Return a paginated list of all API tokens across all users

delete.description: Revoke multiple API tokens at once by their UUIDs

get.description: Return a paginated list of all users with their permissions

post.description: Create a new user account with email, password, name, and permissions
Create a non-login service account with specified permissions

get.description: Return a single user's details and effective permissions

put.description: Update a user's first name, last name, or active status

delete.description: Soft-delete a user account (cannot delete yourself)

put.description: Set the direct permission level for a user (read, write, or admin)

get.description: Return all configured wallets with their balances

post.description: Add a new wallet with encrypted private key storage

delete.description: Remove a wallet (cannot delete the default wallet)

post.description: Query the EVM chain for the current token and gas balance

put.description: Make a wallet the default for upload payments

get.description: List recorded transactions for a wallet (upload payments, refunds), newest first. V2-321.
Return all configured webhook endpoints

post.description: Register a new webhook endpoint for event notifications

put.description: Update an existing webhook's URL, events, integration type, or enabled status

get.description: Return recent delivery log entries for a specific webhook

post.description: Generate a new signing secret for a webhook endpoint
Send a test ping to a webhook endpoint and return the result
Send a password reset link to the provided email address if it exists
Authenticate a user with email and password credentials and return a JWT token
post.summary: Log in with email and password

get.description: Generates state/nonce/PKCE, sets an encrypted cookie, and 302's to the IdP authorize endpoint
Validates the IdP response, resolves or provisions the user, issues a session JWT, and redirects to /

delete.description: Remove an OIDC login method from the current user

post.description: Authenticated user kicks off an OIDC flow that adds a new identity to their account on callback

get.description: Returns enabled OIDC providers for the login page (no secrets, no client_id)

post.description: Create a new user account with email, password, and name
Reset a user's password using a valid reset token from the forgot-password email

get.description: Validate an email verification token and mark the user's email as verified
Returns system health status including database, antd, and queue
Return the authenticated user's profile information

put.description: Update the authenticated user's first name and last name

get.description: Returns the linked OIDC identities for the current user (profile connected accounts)

put.description: Change the authenticated user's password by providing current and new password

post.description: Generate a new email verification token and send it to the authenticated user

get.description: Search uploads by tag key-value filters and/or filename query
Returns whether a default wallet is configured for uploads
List all API tokens owned by the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new API token with specified permissions and expiry

delete.description: Revoke an API token by its UUID

get.description: List all uploads belonging to the authenticated user

post.description: Upload a file via multipart form data and queue it for processing

Get an exact cost quote by sending the file bytes. antd runs self-encryption and queries the live network for chunk pricing — no estimation, no scaling. Returns a structured estimated_cost object with cost, chunk_count, gas, and payment_mode.

get.description: Get a single upload by its UUID

delete.description: Permanently delete a failed or completed upload record

post.description: Cancel a queued or backoff upload

get.description: Download a completed upload's file data from the Autonomi network

post.description: Immediately retry an upload that is in gas backoff state
post.summary: Force retry upload in gas backoff

post.description: Retry a failed upload by resetting it to queued status

get.description: Returns all tags on an upload as a key-value map

put.description: Replace all tags on an upload with the provided set

address.description: optional — derived from private_key if omitted

BearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT or API token as: Bearer <token>
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
